SQLLite.SQL: UPDATE CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO SET CO.ADHOC_DIVIDEND = 'N' WHERE CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND CO.ADHOC_DIVIDEND = 'Y' AND EXISTS (SELECT NULL FROM CANDIDATE_DIVIDEND_PAYMENTS CDP WHERE CDP.CDP_DIV_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND CDP.CDP_CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND CDP.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
